title: pinus longifolia
intro: Pinus longifolia, also known as Himalayan pine or Chir pine, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the pine family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pinus longifolia include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Pinus longifolia include tea, essential oil, and resin extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
